description_long: This guard rail consists of a central section of vertical black metal bars, evenly spaced and connected at the top and bottom by horizontal rails. The metal section is flanked on both sides by robust stone or concrete pillars, each topped with a flat capstone. The base beneath the metal bars appears to be a solid stone or concrete plinth, providing additional stability and a visual foundation. The overall design is both functional and decorative, suitable for urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or residential boundaries. The materials and construction suggest durability and resistance to impact or tampering. The ends of the rail terminate flush with the stone pillars, with no visible flaring or special end treatment.
description: A decorative and sturdy guard rail with black metal bars set between two stone or concrete pillars, featuring a solid base and flat capstones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the guard rail, with vertical black bars and both stone pillars visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness and layered construction of the stone pillar, with the metal bars barely visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, displaying the vertical bars and stone pillars from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again focusing on the stone pillar's profile and the layered capstone detail.
